name: Green Club
about: The Green Club is a 24/7 indoor golf simulator venue located in Midlothian, VA, offering a casual and welcoming environment for golfers of all skill levels. The facility utilizes Trackman's industry-leading technology, including the Trackman iO launch monitor, for AI-powered swing analysis, video replay, and access to over 480 virtual golf courses. Membership plans are available starting at $50 per month, while lessons and hourly bay rentals are offered to non-members. The venue is designed to be a fun and relaxed space, emphasizing accessibility and a positive atmosphere for both practice and play.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading Trackman technology with instant video replay and AI swing analysis
24/7 access allowing practice sessions at any time of day
Welcoming, no dress-code atmosphere with BYOB food and drink policy
Over 480 virtual golf courses to play from around the world
Flexible membership options and no-membership required lessons

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are welcome to bring their own food to create their desired vibe.
Guests are welcome to bring their own alcoholic beverages. The venue also has a partnership with Annie Ruth's Wine Bar & Bistro located just steps away.

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading launch monitor providing AI swing analysis, video replay, and detailed ball and club data tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Absolutely, you can bring your favorite food and drinks to create your perfect vibe. There is no dress code.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: You can easily play a full 18-hole round in under an hour. A 9-hole 2-man scramble match typically takes approximately 75 to 90 minutes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Green Club is a family-friendly venue with a pressure-free environment, making it suitable for beginners of all ages.
